'''Isaru Omin''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was rejected by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi Order]] due to his age and later served as a [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]].

==Biography==
At the age of two, Omin was discovered by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], but was not taken in for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] as he was considered to be too old by that point.

During the last few years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Omin served as a [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]]. He was the partner of [[Sagoro Autem]], and served under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zalin Bey]]. In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]], Omin and Autem investigated the murder of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Jheramahd Greyshade]]. It was discovered that Autem's brother was responsible, with unknowing help from his son, Reymet Autem. Sagoro planned on letting his son escape, and Omin was forced to arrest his partner.

[[File:IsaruOminDeath.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Isaru is killed by Darth Vader.]]

Later, during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Omin was a member of the Guard unit responsible for protecting [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]]. After the [[Declaration of a New Order|formation]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Omin helped his former partner, now wanted by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], to escape from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Refusing to give the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] information, Isaru was brutally killed by Vader.
